   K. AKASH // NEURAL\_CORE.v25  :root{ --bg:#020208;--bg2:#06060f;--bg3:#0a0a18; --cyan:#00f5ff;--cyan2:#00c8d4;--cyan3:#007a85;--cyan4:#003d44; --mag:#ff00aa;--mag2:#cc0088;--mag3:#660044; --grn:#39ff14;--grn2:#1db80d; --ylw:#f5e642;--org:#ff6b00;--pur:#8b00ff; --txt:#c8d8e8;--txt2:#6a8a9a;--txt3:#e8f4ff; --bdr:#0f1f2f;--bdr-c:rgba(0,245,255,.25);--bdr-m:rgba(255,0,170,.25); --gc:0 0 20px rgba(0,245,255,.5),0 0 50px rgba(0,245,255,.25),0 0 100px rgba(0,245,255,.1); --gm:0 0 20px rgba(255,0,170,.5),0 0 50px rgba(255,0,170,.25); --gg:0 0 20px rgba(57,255,20,.5); --gp:0 0 20px rgba(139,0,255,.5),0 0 50px rgba(139,0,255,.25); } \*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;} html{scroll-behavior:smooth;} body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);font-family:'Rajdhani',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none;} /\* SCANLINES \*/ body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 3px,rgba(0,0,0,.06) 3px,rgba(0,0,0,.06) 4px);pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;animation:scanMove 8s linear infinite;} @keyframes scanMove{0%{background-position:0 0;}100%{background-position:0 100px;}} /\* GRID \*/ .grid-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none; background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(0,245,255,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(0,245,255,.04) 1px,transparent 1px); background-size:50px 50px; -webkit-mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%,black 40%,transparent 100%); mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%,black 40%,transparent 100%);} /\* NOISE \*/ .noise{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1;pointer-events:none;opacity:.03; background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 512 512' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.75' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E"); background-size:256px 256px;} /\* ORBS \*/ .orb{position:fixed;border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;filter:blur(100px);} .orb1{width:600px;height:600px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,245,255,.12),transparent 70%);top:-200px;right:-150px;z-index:0;animation:orbFloat 16s ease infinite;} .orb2{width:500px;height:500px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,0,170,.1),transparent 70%);bottom:10%;left:-200px;z-index:0;animation:orbFloat 20s ease 6s infinite;} .orb3{width:350px;height:350px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(139,0,255,.1),transparent 70%);top:40%;right:5%;z-index:0;animation:orbFloat 13s ease 3s infinite;} @keyframes orbFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0) scale(1);}50%{transform:translateY(-20px) scale(1.05);}} /\* CUSTOM CURSOR \*/ .c-ring{position:fixed;width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--cyan);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .15s,height .15s,border-color .15s,opacity .15s;mix-blend-mode:screen;} .c-dot{position:fixed;width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--cyan);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:99999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--cyan);} .c-trail{position:fixed;width:60px;height:60px;border:1px solid rgba(0,245,255,.15);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:99998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:left .4s ease,top .4s ease;} /\* NAV \*/ nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 3rem;height:60px;background:rgba(2,2,8,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(30px) saturate(180%);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bdr-c);} .nav-logo{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cyan);letter-spacing:.2em;text-shadow:var(--gc);} .nav-logo em{color:var(--txt2);font-style:normal;} .nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none;} .nav-links a{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.68rem;color:var(--txt2);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .3s;position:relative;padding:.2rem 0;} .nav-links a::before{content:'//';color:var(--cyan3);margin-right:.4rem;} .nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-2px;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--cyan);transition:width .3s;box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--cyan);} .nav-links a:hover,.nav-links a.act{color:var(--cyan);text-shadow:var(--gc);} .nav-links a:hover::after,.nav-links a.act::after{width:100%;} .nav-r{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.5rem;} .nav-status{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;color:var(--grn);letter-spacing:.12em;} .s-dot{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--grn);border-radius:50%;animation:sPulse 2s infinite;box-shadow:var(--gg);} @keyframes sPulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;box-shadow:var(--gg);}50%{opacity:.3;box-shadow:none;}} /\* ===== HERO ===== \*/ #hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;padding:6rem 2rem 3rem;z-index:2;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;} /\* Hex grid hero bg \*/ #hero::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 50% 50%,rgba(0,245,255,.04) 0%,transparent 70%);pointer-events:none;} .hero-tag{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.65rem;color:var(--cyan3);letter-spacing:.4em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;animation:fadeUp .8s ease forwards;} .hero-tag::before,.hero-tag::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--cyan4));} .hero-tag::after{background:linear-gradient(to left,transparent,var(--cyan4));} .hero-name{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(3.5rem,9vw,8rem);font-weight:900;line-height:.9;letter-spacing:-.02em;color:var(--txt3);margin-bottom:.5rem;animation:fadeUp .9s ease .1s forwards;opacity:0;position:relative;display:inline-block;} .hero-name .h1{color:transparent;-webkit-text-stroke:2px var(--cyan);text-shadow:none;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 20px var(--cyan)) drop-shadow(0 0 40px rgba(0,245,255,.4));} .hero-name .h2{color:var(--cyan);text-shadow:var(--gc);} /\* Glitch layers \*/ .glitch-wrap{position:relative;display:inline-block;} .glitch-wrap::before{content:attr(data-text);position:absolute;top:0;left:0;color:var(--mag);clip-path:polygon(0 20%,100% 20%,100% 40%,0 40%);animation:gA 3.5s infinite;pointer-events:none;} .glitch-wrap::after{content:attr(data-text);position:absolute;top:0;left:0;color:var(--cyan2);clip-path:polygon(0 60%,100% 60%,100% 80%,0 80%);animation:gB 3.5s infinite;pointer-events:none;} @keyframes gA{0%,85%,100%{transform:translate(-3px,-1px);opacity:0;}87%{transform:translate(-5px,2px);opacity:.8;}91%{transform:translate(3px,-2px);opacity:.8;}95%{opacity:0;}} @keyframes gB{0%,85%,100%{transform:translate(3px,1px);opacity:0;}87%{transform:translate(5px,-2px);opacity:.8;}91%{transform:translate(-3px,2px);opacity:.8;}95%{opacity:0;}} .hero-sub{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:clamp(.65rem,1.8vw,.85rem);color:var(--mag);letter-spacing:.3em;margin-bottom:2.5rem;text-shadow:var(--gm);animation:fadeUp 1s ease .2s forwards;opacity:0;} /\* TYPING \*/ .typing-block{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:3rem;animation:fadeUp 1s ease .35s forwards;opacity:0;background:rgba(0,245,255,.03);border:1px solid rgba(0,245,255,.12);padding:.7rem 1.5rem;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 10px) 0,100% 10px,100% 100%,10px 100%,0 calc(100% - 10px));} .t-pre{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--grn);letter-spacing:.1em;} #typed{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(1rem,2.5vw,1.5rem);font-weight:600;color:var(--cyan);letter-spacing:.08em;text-shadow:0 0 15px rgba(0,245,255,.8),0 0 30px rgba(0,245,255,.4),0 0 60px rgba(0,245,255,.2);min-width:2px;} .t-cur{display:inline-block;width:2px;height:1.2em;background:var(--cyan);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--cyan),0 0 16px var(--cyan);vertical-align:middle;margin-left:2px;animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;} @keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0;}} /\* DATA PILLS \*/ .hero-pills{display:flex;gap:.8rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:2.5rem;animation:fadeUp 1s ease .48s forwards;opacity:0;} .pill{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;padding:.3rem .8rem;border:1px solid;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;} .pill-c{border-color:rgba(0,245,255,.3);color:var(--cyan2);background:rgba(0,245,255,.04);} .pill-m{border-color:rgba(255,0,170,.3);color:var(--mag);background:rgba(255,0,170,.04);} .pill-g{border-color:rgba(57,255,20,.3);color:var(--grn);background:rgba(57,255,20,.04);} .hero-ctas{display:flex;gap:1rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:fadeUp 1s ease .58s forwards;opacity:0;} .btn{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;padding:.85rem 2.2rem;border:1px solid;transition:all .3s;cursor:none;position:relative;overflow:hidden;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 14px) 0,100% 14px,100% 100%,14px 100%,0 calc(100% - 14px));} .btn::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;} .btn-p{border-color:var(--cyan);color:var(--cyan);} .btn-p::before{background:var(--cyan);} .btn-p:hover{color:var(--bg);box-shadow:var(--gc);} .btn-p:hover::before{opacity:1;} .btn-s{border-color:var(--mag);color:var(--mag);} .btn-s::before{background:var(--mag);} .btn-s:hover{color:var(--bg);box-shadow:var(--gm);} .btn-s:hover::before{opacity:1;} .btn span{position:relative;z-index:1;} /\* Corner brackets \*/ .hc{position:absolute;width:50px;height:50px;border-color:rgba(0,245,255,.25);border-style:solid;animation:fadeUp 1.5s ease forwards;} .hc.tl{top:80px;left:40px;border-width:1px 0 0 1px;} .hc.tr{top:80px;right:40px;border-width:1px 1px 0 0;} .hc.bl{bottom:30px;left:40px;border-width:0 0 1px 1px;} .hc.br{bottom:30px;right:40px;border-width:0 1px 1px 0;} .scroll-ind{position:absolute;bottom:2rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;animation:fadeUp 2s ease 1s forwards;opacity:0;} .scroll-ind span{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.55rem;color:var(--txt2);letter-spacing:.4em;text-transform:uppercase;} .scroll-line{width:1px;height:40px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--cyan3),transparent);animation:scrollP 2s ease infinite;} @keyframes scrollP{0%,100%{opacity:.3;}50%{opacity:1;}} /\* ===== SECTIONS ===== \*/ section{position:relative;z-index:2;padding:6rem 2rem;} .container{max-width:1120px;margin:0 auto;} .sh{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.5rem;margin-bottom:3.5rem;} .s-tag{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;color:var(--cyan3);letter-spacing:.35em;text-transform:uppercase;white-space:nowrap;} .s-title{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:clamp(1.3rem,3vw,2rem);font-weight:700;color:var(--txt3);letter-spacing:.05em;white-space:nowrap;} .s-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,rgba(0,245,255,.35),transparent);} .s-line2{width:60px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to left,rgba(0,245,255,.35),transparent);} /\* ===== ABOUT ===== \*/ #about{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg2) 0%,var(--bg) 100%);} .about-g{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr .9fr;gap:4rem;align-items:start;} .about-text p{color:var(--txt2);font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:1.2rem;} .about-text .ac{color:var(--cyan);font-weight:600;} .about-text .am{color:var(--mag);font-weight:500;} .terminal{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--bdr-c);padding:1.5rem;position:relative;margin-top:1.5rem;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 15px) 0,100% 15px,100% 100%,15px 100%,0 calc(100% - 15px));} .terminal::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:15px;width:0;height:0;border-top:15px solid var(--cyan4);border-left:15px solid transparent;} .t-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:1rem;padding-bottom:.8rem;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,245,255,.1);} .t-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;} .t-dot.r{background:#ff5f57;box-shadow:0 0 6px #ff5f57;} .t-dot.y{background:#ffbd2e;box-shadow:0 0 6px #ffbd2e;} .t-dot.g{background:#28ca41;box-shadow:0 0 6px #28ca41;} .t-title{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;color:var(--txt2);letter-spacing:.2em;margin-left:auto;} .t-body{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.76rem;line-height:2;} .tp{color:var(--grn);} .tc{color:var(--cyan);} .thl{color:var(--mag);} .tv{color:var(--ylw);} .to{color:var(--txt2);} .cblink{display:inline-block;width:7px;height:13px;background:var(--cyan);vertical-align:middle;animation:blink 1s step-end infinite;} .stats-g{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem;} .stat-c{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bdr-c);padding:1.5rem 1.2rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .3s;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 12px) 0,100% 12px,100% 100%,0 100%);} .stat-c::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:12px;width:0;height:0;border-top:12px solid var(--cyan3);border-left:12px solid transparent;} .stat-c::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--cyan);transition:width .4s;box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--cyan);} .stat-c:hover::after{width:100%;} .stat-c:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);transform:translateY(-3px);} .stat-n{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--cyan);text-shadow:var(--gc);line-height:1;} .stat-l{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;color:var(--txt2);letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:.4rem;} /\* ===== SKILLS ===== \*/ #skills{background:var(--bg);} .skills-g{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(280px,1fr));gap:1.5rem;} .sk-cat{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bdr);padding:1.8rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .4s;cursor:default;} .sk-cat::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--cyan),var(--pur));transition:height .4s;box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--cyan);} .sk-cat:hover{border-color:var(--bdr-c);transform:translateY(-5px) scale(1.01);box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.5),inset 0 0 30px rgba(0,245,255,.03);} .sk-cat:hover::before{height:100%;} .sk-cat-h{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:1.4rem;} .sk-icon{font-size:1.3rem;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 6px var(--cyan));} .sk-title{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--cyan);letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;} .sk-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem;} .sk-tag{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.66rem;padding:.28rem .72rem;border:1px solid rgba(0,245,255,.15);color:var(--txt2);letter-spacing:.08em;transition:all .25s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;} .sk-tag::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--cyan);opacity:0;transition:opacity .25s;} .sk-tag:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);color:var(--bg);text-shadow:none;} .sk-tag:hover::before{opacity:1;} .sk-tag span{position:relative;z-index:1;} /\* ===== CERTIFICATIONS ===== \*/ #certifications{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg2) 0%,var(--bg3) 100%);} .certs-g{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(320px,1fr));gap:1.8rem;} .cert-c{background:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--bdr);position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:all .4s;cursor:default;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 20px) 0,100% 20px,100% 100%,20px 100%,0 calc(100% - 20px));} .cert-c::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;right:20px;width:0;height:0;border-top:20px solid var(--bdr);border-left:20px solid transparent;transition:border-top-color .3s;} .cert-c:hover{border-color:rgba(0,245,255,.4);transform:translateY(-8px);box-shadow:0 25px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.6),0 0 30px rgba(0,245,255,.08),inset 0 0 40px rgba(0,245,255,.02);} .cert-c:hover::after{border-top-color:var(--cyan3);} /\* Animated top border on hover \*/ .cert-c::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--cyan),transparent);transition:left .5s;z-index:1;} .cert-c:hover::before{left:100%;} /\* Scan line effect \*/ .cert-c .scan{position:absolute;left:0;width:100%;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,rgba(0,245,255,.3),transparent);top:-5%;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;animation:none;pointer-events:none;} .cert-c:hover .scan{opacity:1;animation:scanLine 1.5s linear infinite;} @keyframes scanLine{0%{top:-5%;}100%{top:105%;}} .cert-img-wrap{position:relative;overflow:hidden;height:180px;background:var(--bg2);} .cert-img-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;transition:transform .5s,filter .3s;filter:saturate(.8) brightness(.9);} .cert-c:hover .cert-img-wrap img{transform:scale(1.04);filter:saturate(1.1) brightness(1);} /\* overlay on image \*/ .cert-img-wrap::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(2,2,8,0) 40%,var(--bg) 100%);pointer-events:none;} /\* glitch flicker on cert image hover \*/ .cert-c:hover .cert-img-wrap img{animation:imgFlicker .15s ease 0s 1;} @keyframes imgFlicker{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.85;transform:scale(1.04) translateX(2px);filter:saturate(1.3) hue-rotate(5deg);}} .cert-body{padding:1.2rem 1.4rem 1.4rem;} .cert-issuer{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;margin-bottom:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;} .ci-badge{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.56rem;padding:.18rem .55rem;border:1px solid;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;} .ci-google{border-color:rgba(66,133,244,.5);color:#4285f4;background:rgba(66,133,244,.06);} .ci-iant{border-color:rgba(0,245,255,.35);color:var(--cyan2);background:rgba(0,245,255,.04);} .ci-cmr{border-color:rgba(245,230,66,.45);color:var(--ylw);background:rgba(245,230,66,.04);} .ci-ieee{border-color:rgba(0,164,228,.45);color:#00a4e4;background:rgba(0,164,228,.04);} .cert-title{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt3);margin-bottom:.6rem;letter-spacing:.04em;line-height:1.4;} .cert-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap;} .ct{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.56rem;padding:.18rem .52rem;border:1px solid;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;} .ct-badge{border-color:rgba(57,255,20,.5);color:var(--grn);} .ct-comp{border-color:rgba(0,200,212,.4);color:var(--cyan2);} .ct-excel{border-color:rgba(245,230,66,.5);color:var(--ylw);} .ct-appr{border-color:rgba(255,0,170,.5);color:var(--mag);} .cert-date{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.55rem;color:var(--txt2);letter-spacing:.08em;} /\* ===== EXPERIENCE ===== \*/ #experience{background:var(--bg);} .timeline{position:relative;padding-left:2.5rem;} .timeline::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:1px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--cyan),rgba(139,0,255,.4),transparent);} .tl-item{position:relative;padding:0 0 3.5rem 2rem;} .tl-item::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-5px;top:.35rem;width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--cyan);box-shadow:var(--gc);border-radius:50%;border:2px solid var(--bg);animation:nodePulse 3s infinite;} @keyframes nodePulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(0,245,255,.5);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,245,255,.8),0 0 40px rgba(0,245,255,.4);}} .tl-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;} .tl-period{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;color:var(--cyan3);letter-spacing:.15em;} .tl-org{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.62rem;color:var(--mag);letter-spacing:.1em;text-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(255,0,170,.35);} .tl-role{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt3);margin-bottom:.65rem;letter-spacing:.05em;} .tl-desc{font-size:.95rem;color:var(--txt2);font-weight:300;line-height:1.8;} /\* ===== CONTACT ===== \*/ #contact{background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--bg3) 0%,var(--bg2) 100%);text-align:center;} .contact-intro{font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--txt2);max-width:520px;margin:0 auto 3rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;} .contact-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;} .c-link{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;padding:.85rem 1.8rem;border:1px solid var(--bdr);color:var(--txt2);transition:all .3s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;clip-path:polygon(0 0,calc(100% - 8px) 0,100% 8px,100% 100%,8px 100%,0 calc(100% - 8px));} .c-link::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,245,255,.06);opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;} .c-link:hover{border-color:var(--cyan);color:var(--cyan);box-shadow:var(--gc);} .c-link:hover::before{opacity:1;} /\* ===== FOOTER ===== \*/ footer{position:relative;z-index:2;border-top:1px solid var(--bdr-c);padding:1.8rem 3rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;background:var(--bg);flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;} footer::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(to right,transparent,var(--cyan),transparent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--cyan);opacity:.4;} .f-logo{font-family:'Orbitron',monospace;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--cyan3);letter-spacing:.22em;} .f-copy{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;color:var(--txt2);letter-spacing:.1em;} .f-sys{font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;color:var(--grn);letter-spacing:.1em;} /\* REVEAL \*/ .reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity .75s ease,transform .75s ease;} .reveal.v{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);} /\* KEYFRAMES \*/ @keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(35px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}} /\* MOBILE \*/ @media(max-width:768px){ nav{padding:0 1.2rem;} .nav-links{display:none;} .about-g{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2.5rem;} .hc{display:none;} footer{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;} .hero-pills{gap:.5rem;} }

K.AKASH _// NEURAL\_CORE.v25_

ONLINE

INITIALIZING PROFILE  ·  NEURAL\_CORE.v25  ·  SYSTEM READY

K. AKASH


============

// NEURAL\_CORE.v25 // BALLARI, KARNATAKA //

❯ 

Google Cloud Certified IEEE Award Winner Grade A · Python

[View Certifications](#certifications) [Initialize Contact](#contact)

Scroll Down

01 // ABOUT

System Profile
--------------

I'm K. Akash, an AI Generalist and builder operating at the frontier of intelligent systems. I craft solutions at the intersection of machine learning, data engineering, and cloud AI.

Certified across Google Cloud's full AI curriculum — from Generative AI and Large Language Models to Vertex AI Prompt Design and Responsible AI. Grade A in Python.

1st place winner at Cognitive Combat, Techno Whiz '25 — recognized by IEEE Bangalore Section and Institution's Innovation Council, CMR University.

NEURAL\_CORE.v25 — bash

❯ whoami

  → K. Akash — AI Generalist, Ballari, KA

❯ python --certification

  → IANT Certified · Grade A · 25.09.2024

❯ gcloud badges --list

  → 4 badges earned · Google Cloud AI Track

❯ status --live

  → Exploring · Building · Winning

4+

04 // LOG

Mission Log
-----------

2025 — PRESENT// ACTIVE MISSION

### AI Generalist & Independent Builder

Building at the frontier of AI — generative models, prompt engineering, and data-driven applications. Certified across Google Cloud's full AI curriculum. Continuously exploring and shipping.

July 2025// CMR UNIVERSITY · IEEE BANGALORE SECTION

### 1st Place — Cognitive Combat (Techno Whiz '25)

Won first place in "Cognitive Combat" coding skills event organized by Dept. of CSE, SOET, CMR University. Recognized by IEEE Bangalore Section and Institution's Innovation Council.

September 2024// IANT COMPUTER EDUCATION

### Python Training — Grade A

Completed Python training at IANT (Institute of Advance Network Technology), Ballari, Karnataka. Awarded Grade A. Reg. No. KAR-BL-24-07-0009.

05 // CONTACT

Initialize Contact
------------------

Open to collaborations, interesting problems, and conversations about AI, building, and the future. Let's create something exceptional.

[GitHub](https://github.com/kakashsunny) [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/k-akash-%F0%9F%A4%96-724b11330?utm_source=share&utm_campaign=share_via&utm_content=profile&utm_medium=android_app) [Twitter / X](https://twitter.com)

K.AKASH // NEURAL\_CORE.v25

© 2025 — All systems nominal

SYS: ONLINE // UPTIME: 99.9%

/\* CURSOR \*/ const cRing=document.getElementById('cRing'),cDot=document.getElementById('cDot'),cTrail=document.getElementById('cTrail'); let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0; document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{ mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY; cDot.style.left=mx+'px';cDot.style.top=my+'px'; cTrail.style.left=mx+'px';cTrail.style.top=my+'px'; }); (function animC(){ rx+=(mx-rx)\*.1;ry+=(my-ry)\*.1; cRing.style.left=rx+'px';cRing.style.top=ry+'px'; requestAnimationFrame(animC); })(); document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.sk-tag,.cert-c,.stat-c').forEach(el=>{ el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{cRing.style.width='42px';cRing.style.height='42px';cRing.style.borderColor='var(--mag)';cDot.style.background='var(--mag)';}); el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{cRing.style.width='28px';cRing.style.height='28px';cRing.style.borderColor='var(--cyan)';cDot.style.background='var(--cyan)';}); }); /\* TYPING \*/ const words=\['AI Generalist','Builder','Explorer'\]; let wi=0,ci=0,del=false; const tel=document.getElementById('typed'); function type(){ const w=words\[wi\]; if(!del){ tel.textContent=w.slice(0,++ci); if(ci===w.length){del=true;setTimeout(type,1700);return;} setTimeout(type,80+Math.random()\*50); } else { tel.textContent=w.slice(0,--ci); if(ci===0){del=false;wi=(wi+1)%words.length;setTimeout(type,400);return;} setTimeout(type,38+Math.random()\*22); } } setTimeout(type,800); /\* REVEAL \*/ const revEls=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal'); const ro=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{ entries.forEach((e,i)=>{if(e.isIntersecting){setTimeout(()=>e.target.classList.add('v'),i\*60);ro.unobserve(e.target);}}); },{threshold:.08}); revEls.forEach(r=>ro.observe(r)); /\* NAV ACTIVE \*/ const secs=document.querySelectorAll('section\[id\]'); const nls=document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a'); window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{ let cur=''; secs.forEach(s=>{if(window.scrollY>=s.offsetTop-140)cur=s.id;}); nls.forEach(a=>a.classList.toggle('act',a.getAttribute('href')==='#'+cur)); }); /\* RANDOM GLITCH on title every ~5s \*/ const gw=document.querySelector('.glitch-wrap'); setInterval(()=>{ gw.style.transform=\`translateX(${(Math.random()-.5)\*4}px)\`; setTimeout(()=>gw.style.transform='',80); },5000);
